N4F_RELIGIOUS (N4F) Spiritual/Religious Activities CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: general activity preference - spiritual/religious activities. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
455 N4G N4G_TRIPS (N4G) Trips/Shopping CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: general activity preference - trips/shopping. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
456 N4H N4H_WALKING (N4H) Walking/Wheeling Outdoors CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: general activity preference - walking/wheeling outdoors. 0
